description_long: This is a two-story bungalow with a hip roof, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns and a covered carport on one side. The facade combines brickwork on the lower level with lighter cladding above, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, each with decorative shutters. The property includes a fenced yard with landscaping elements such as palm trees and shrubs, as well as a patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella. The rear of the bungalow has large glass doors opening onto the patio, providing ample natural light to the interior. The side and rear fences enclose the outdoor living spaces, and the overall structure sits on a rectangular plot with paved walkways. The architectural style blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines and a balanced, inviting appearance.
description: A two-story hip-roof bungalow with a brick and light-clad facade, front porch, carport, and landscaped fenced yard with patio and outdoor furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows with shutters, front porch, and part of the carport.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, fenced yard, palm tree, and patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, patio with umbrella, and the full extent of the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window, side fencing, and additional landscaping elements.
